🎉 Annual Makeup Blowout Sale in Topeka, KS! ❤️
💥 FREE Fabulous Eyeshadow when you arrive!
Join us only this weekend for our HUGE annual sale on makeup, skincare, hair care, and more in 2026! 😍

🗓️ When: Jun 26th -Jun 28th, 2026
🕙 Hours: 10 AM - 5 PM
📍 Where: 1717 SW Topeka Blvd, Topeka, KS 66612 Hotel Topeka. At City Center.

For more info & a FREE GIFT 🎁 https://events.themakeupblowout.com/events/topeka-ks-2026/

🚨 Don’t miss out on up to 75% OFF!
✔️ Free Entrance ✔️ Kids Welcome
✔️ Cash & Cards Accepted

Mark your calendars for this exciting annual event and grab your FREE Fabulous Eyeshadow!

#AnnualMakeupBlowout2026 #BeautyDeals
